goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'mexican' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '19:30' on 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'star of the hotel'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve mexican food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 19:30 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get postcode, address, and star of the hotel
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
